statements.status_notes: The vulnerable code (go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk/resource host_id_bsd.go, which runs 'kenv' without an absolute path) is gated behind DragonFly/FreeBSD/NetBSD/OpenBSD/Solaris build tags. Kubernetes ships only linux/windows/darwin binaries, so the vulnerable BSD-specific code is not compiled into shipped artifacts. A maintainer confirmed Kubernetes does not ship binaries or images for any of the affected platforms, so it is not affected. [ref: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/138329]
